file: 1420_Zhang 等 - 2016 - Shape Selectivity in Hydroisomerization of Hexadecane over Pt Supported on 10-Ring Zeolites ZSM-22,.txt

experiments.description: 在固定床微反应器中，在4 MPa压力下，使用Pt/ZSM-22、Pt/ZSM-23、Pt/ZSM-35、Pt/ZSM-48及其混合催化剂（Pt/ZSM-23/35、Pt/ZSM-35/48）进行正十六烷（n-hexadecane）的加氢异构化反应。通过改变接触时间和温度（260-300°C）来监测转化率和异构体选择性，H2/n-C16体积比为600。
experiments.text_snippet: The n-hexadecane hydroisomerization was carried out at 4 MPa in a fixed-bed microreactor, loaded with 0.1 g of the catalyst powder. The n-hexadecane conversion was monitored by varying the contact time and temperature. The volume ratio H2/n-C16 was chosen to be 600.

Conversion rate.original: Varies with catalyst and conditions (e.g., ~98% over Pt/ZSM-23 and Pt/ZSM-35 at 300°C)

Product Selectivity.original: Varies with catalyst and conditions (e.g., higher selectivity over Pt/ZSM-23 at low temperature and short contact time, higher selectivity over Pt/ZSM-48 at high temperature and long contact time)
